tracks.meaning: a group of musicians playing together, especially a rock or pop group
a flat strip or loop of material worn around a part of the body, such as an armband or headband
to form or gather together into a group for a common purpose
a strip or loop that holds things together or binds parts of something
a strip of material used to bind or fasten components together in building
a range of frequencies or wavelengths allocated for transmission in radio or telecommunications
a stripe or layer of rock or mineral of a different color or composition
a range of numerical values within specified limits, such as a salary band or age band
a group of people united for a shared purpose or cause, often used negatively
a group of soldiers or armed fighters operating together
a stripe or armband indicating rank or authority in military or formal dress
